name: ArcGIS MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for ArcGIS content search and geospatial data access from Esri's ArcGIS platform. Enables AI agents to search ArcGIS Online content, discover maps and spatial datasets, and integrate geospatial data into AI workflows — bridging the gap between GIS data and AI-driven analysis.
use_cases: Searching ArcGIS Online for maps and spatial datasets from research agents
Discovering publicly available geospatial content for analysis agents
Integrating ArcGIS map layers into AI-driven geographic analysis workflows
Finding relevant GIS datasets for spatial AI applications
not_for: Teams not using ArcGIS Online or the ArcGIS platform
Complex geoprocessing operations (use ArcGIS API directly for computation)
Non-Esri GIS workflows (QGIS, PostGIS require different tools)
best_when: A GIS team or spatial analyst using ArcGIS wants AI agents to discover and retrieve geospatial content — enabling natural language GIS content search and data discovery.
avoid_when: You need full geoprocessing capabilities or use non-Esri GIS tools. This focuses on content discovery, not spatial computation.

auth.notes: ArcGIS OAuth 2.0 or API key. Public content accessible without auth. Private content requires ArcGIS credentials. From esrisaudiarabia (Esri Saudi Arabia regional office).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public ArcGIS content is free to search; private content requires ArcGIS subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: ArcGIS Online subscription for private content and advanced features
pricing.notes: Public ArcGIS content is free. ArcGIS Online subscription required for private org content. MCP server is free open source from Esri regional office.

performance.rate_limits: ArcGIS API rate limits apply by account tier

known_agent_gotchas: From esrisaudiarabia (Esri regional office) — not from main Esri org; evaluate quality accordingly
ArcGIS content search results quality depends on what's published in ArcGIS Online
Private org content requires ArcGIS subscription and OAuth setup
GIS data can be very large — agents should filter by extent and use paginaton
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to ArcGIS Online. OAuth for private content. Public content doesn't require auth. Geospatial data sensitivity varies by dataset.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS to Esri ArcGIS Online. OAuth for private content. Public GIS datasets are open access.
